assignments.name: Copy_1_of_New_MACD_LI_Record_Move
assignments.label: Copy 1 of New MACD LI Record - Move

assignments.name: Copy_1_of_Put_New_MACD_LI_to_Collection_Move
assignments.label: Copy 1 of Put New MACD LI to Collection - Move

assignments.name: Put_New_MACD_LI_to_Collection_Move
assignments.label: Put New MACD LI to Collection - Move

decisions.name: Copy_1_of_Check_if_Name_was_updated
decisions.label: Copy 1 of Check if Name was updated

formulas.name: storageLocation
formulas.expression: IF({!Are_the_assets_going_into_Storage} = "Yes", IF({!Where_is_it_going_into_storage} = "Xeretec Location", "Move - Store", "Move - Customer Store"), "Move - New Location")

loops.name: Copy_1_of_Loop_Over_Parent_Assets_Move
loops.label: Copy 1 of Loop Over Parent Assets - Move

recordUpdates.name: Update_Opportunity_to_Exclude_from_MACD
recordUpdates.label: Update Opportunity to Exclude from MACD

fields.name: Asset_Dispose_Text
fields.fieldText: Choose an asset/assets you want to move:

validationRule.errorMessage: Date has to be greater than today, please change date accordingly.

fields.name: newMoveText
fields.fieldText: Would you like to move of another asset(s)?

fields.name: Parent_Asset_Text
fields.fieldText:
Opportunity's account does not have any parent assets related to it.


Click "Exit" to exit the process.

fields.name: Are_the_assets_going_into_Storage
fields.fieldText: Are the assets going into Storage

fields.name: Where_is_it_going_into_storage
fields.fieldText: Where is it going into storage?

screens.name: Update_current_or_Add_new_Move_screen
screens.label: Update current or Add new Move screen

fields.name: Would_you_like_to_update_current_moves_or_add_a_new_move
fields.fieldText: Would you like to update current moves or add a new move?

variables.description: Displays parent assets related to a selected account
variables.name: assetsToUpdate
